$comment: Registry of YHQ sign and rule codes used by content. NOT a schema - the validator reads it to warn about codes nobody has checked against the official text yet.
_note: Every code below was drafted from Russian-PDD-style numbering and is
UNVERIFIED against the official Uzbek YHQ (Yo'l harakati qoidalari).
A domain expert must confirm each one and flip `verified` to true.
Until then the validator emits a warning per use, so the debt stays visible.
Fixing this is cheap across 5 scenarios and expensive across 1200.

13.9.meaning_en: Secondary road must give way to the main road

13.11.meaning_en: Equal-priority intersection: give way to the right; trams have priority over non-rail vehicles

13.12.meaning_en: Turning left or reversing: give way to oncoming traffic going straight
